prompt: Create an elegant luxury travel poster for NORTHERN EUROPE, designed like a premium tourism campaign brochure cover. Use a wide symmetrical layout with a thin gold decorative border and refined editorial typography. At the top center, place a small compass-star icon above the word DISCOVER, then a very large serif headline reading NORTHERN EUROPE in deep navy blue. Below it, add a gold uppercase tagline: BREATHTAKING NATURE. RICH CULTURE. TIMELESS EXPERIENCES. and beneath that a smaller elegant italic line: Four Countries. Countless Memories.. The main image area is divided into 4 equal vertical scenic panels showing iconic destinations at golden hour with soft glowing skies and cinematic realism. Panel 1: Denmark, Copenhagen, a colorful harbor waterfront with historic buildings, boats, calm reflective water, and a domed landmark in the background; include a small Danish flag above the labels DENMARK and COPENHAGEN. Panel 2: Sweden, Stockholm, a waterfront old-town skyline with church spires and warm sunset light reflected in the water; include a small Swedish flag above the labels SWEDEN and STOCKHOLM. Panel 3: Finland, Helsinki, a small stone castle-like island fortress in blue water under a bright sky; include a small Finnish flag above the labels FINLAND and HELSINKI. Panel 4: Norway, dramatic fjords with steep jagged mountains, a waterfall, and a tiny red-roof coastal village at the water’s edge; include a small Norwegian flag above the labels NORWAY and FJORDS OF NORWAY. Beneath the 4 country panels, add a row of 4 gold line icons with captions, evenly spaced: mountain icon with ICONIC LANDSCAPES, Viking ship icon with RICH HERITAGE, moose icon with WILD NATURE, camera icon with UNFORGETTABLE JOURNEYS. Near the bottom center, place a gold divider and the title A TASTE OF THE NORTH. Under it, show exactly 5 food thumbnail panels in a horizontal strip, each on a plate or bowl with warm appetizing lighting and dark blue framing: 1) Smørrebrød — Denmark, open-faced sandwich topped with shrimp; 2) Köttbullar — Sweden, Swedish meatballs with cream sauce and lingonberries; 3) Gravad lax — Finland, sliced cured salmon in a bowl; 4) Fish soup — Norway, creamy fish soup with herbs and seafood; 5) Kanelbulle — Sweden, a glossy cinnamon bun on a plate. Use a polished high-end travel-ad aesthetic, photorealistic scenery, soft sunset color grading, navy and gold graphic design, balanced composition, crisp text placement, and a nostalgic upscale European tourism mood.
